item.DESCRIPT: X = space will match asterisk in COA
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Returns the Userlist based on the Selection from the User
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Returns all relevant user for provided lines
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Get Stack User Type by LBA Level
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Get coder list based on company code and/or requester
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Check if sap user is valid
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Select to get the Approver based on Accounting Data
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Filter the Open Lines based on Accounting Data
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Call the BADI to initialize the Coder
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Call the BADI to initialize the Requester
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: User Name in User Master Record
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Open Text User Mapping Object ID
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Open Text User Mapping Object ID
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Approval History for Level Based Approvals
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Line item number used for COA check
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Open Text User Mapping Object ID
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Open Text User Mapping Object ID
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: At Least one item Value must be filled
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: All fields in COA/invoice line match
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: If line is empty, return any approver
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Approval History for Level Based Approvals
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Open Text User Mapping Object ID
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

item.DESCRIPT: Unable to calculate the Net or Gross Amount
item.AUTHOR: PSABINO

LOCALS_DEF.item: *"* use this source file for any type declarations you need

LOCALS_MAC.item: *"* use this source file for any macro definitions you need
*"* in the implementation part of the class

CHECKVALIDUSR.item: * If optusr id is passed chk for valid sap usr id
IF sapusrid IS INITIAL AND NOT optusrid IS INITIAL.
SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM usr01 INNER JOIN usr02

CONSTRUCTOR.item: lt_dd03p TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF dd03p,
lt_dfies TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF dfies,
* read COA append structure field list
READ TABLE lt_dd03p INTO ls_dd03p WITH KEY fieldname = '.INCLU--AP'.
APPEND LINES OF lt_dfies TO mt_add_coa_fields.

DYNAMIC_SELECT.item: ***Passing the Company Code from Invoice Data
***to dynamic Select for finding the Approver
CONCATENATE c_tabname '~' c_bukrs ' EQ' ' ' c_char is_header-company_code c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
***to dynamic Select for finding the Approver
* IF iv_level IS NOT INITIAL AND lt_where[] IS INITIAL AND iv_skip = 'X'."VIMI-28927
IF lt_where[] IS INITIAL AND iv_skip = 'X'."VIMI-28927
CONCATENATE c_tabname '~' c_level ' GE' ' ' c_char iv_level c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE c_tabname '~' c_level ' GT' ' ' c_char iv_level c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
* ELSEIF iv_level IS NOT INITIAL AND lt_where[] IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_skip = 'X'."VIMI-28927
ELSEIF lt_where[] IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_skip = 'X'."VIMI-28927
CONCATENATE ' AND' c_tabname1 '~' c_level ' GE' ' ' c_char iv_level c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE ' AND' c_tabname1 '~' c_level ' GT' ' ' c_char iv_level c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
* ELSEIF iv_level IS NOT INITIAL AND lt_where[] IS INITIAL AND iv_skip IS INITIAL."VIMI-28927
ELSEIF lt_where[] IS INITIAL AND iv_skip IS INITIAL."VIMI-28927
CONCATENATE c_tabname '~' c_level ' EQ' ' ' c_char iv_level c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
* ELSEIF iv_level IS NOT INITIAL AND lt_where[] IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_skip IS INITIAL."VIMI-28927
ELSEIF lt_where[] IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_skip IS INITIAL."VIMI-28927
CONCATENATE ' AND' c_tabname1 '~' c_level ' EQ' ' ' c_char iv_level c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
*****Passing the Current Approver from Invoice Data
IF iv_level_up IS INITIAL AND iv_current_approver IS NOT INITIAL AND lt_where[] IS INITIAL.
CONCATENATE c_tabname '~' c_current_approver ' NE' ' ' c_char iv_current_approver c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
ELSEIF iv_level_up IS INITIAL AND iv_current_approver IS NOT INITIAL AND lt_where[] IS NOT INITIAL.
CONCATENATE ' AND' c_tabname1 '~' c_current_approver ' NE' ' ' c_char iv_current_approver c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
***Passing the Accounting Data based on Configurations from Invoice Data
***to dynamic Select for finding the Approver
ASSIGN COMPONENT ls_401-fieldname OF STRUCTURE ls_cost_elem TO <lv_field>.
****Logic for Preparing the Dynamic Where Clause
CONCATENATE c_tabname '~' ls_401-fieldname ' IN' lv_value c_char c_space c_char ',' lv_asetrik INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE c_tabname '~' ls_401-fieldname ' IN' lv_value lv_asetrik INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE c_tabname1 '~' ls_401-fieldname ' IN' lv_value c_char c_space c_char ',' lv_asetrik INTO lv_where_clause1.
CONCATENATE c_tabname1 '~' ls_401-fieldname ' IN' lv_value lv_asetrik INTO lv_where_clause1.
CONCATENATE lv_where_clause ' AND' lv_where_clause1 INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE ' (' c_tabname '~' ls_401-fieldname' LE' lv_value INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE lv_where_clause ' OR ' c_tabname1 '~' ls_401-fieldname ' EQ ' c_char c_space c_char INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE lv_where_clause ' OR ' c_tabname1 '~' ls_401-fieldname ' EQ ' lv_asetrik ')' INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE ' AND' ' (' c_tabname1 '~' ls_401-fieldname ' LE ' lv_value INTO lv_where_clause1.
CONCATENATE lv_where_clause1 ' OR ' c_tabname1 '~' ls_401-fieldname ' EQ ' c_char c_space c_char INTO lv_where_clause1.
CONCATENATE lv_where_clause1 ' OR ' c_tabname1 '~' ls_401-fieldname ' EQ ' lv_asetrik ')' INTO lv_where_clause.
CONCATENATE ' AND ' ' (' c_tabname1 '~' lv_fieldname ' GE ' lv_value INTO lv_where_clause1.
CONCATENATE lv_where_clause1 ' OR ' c_tabname1 '~' lv_fieldname ' EQ ' lv_asetrik INTO lv_where_clause1.
CONCATENATE lv_where_clause1 ' OR ' c_tabname1 '~' lv_fieldname ' EQ ' c_char c_space c_char ')' INTO lv_where_clause.
***Select for /opt/appr_coa based on Dynamic Where Clause
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
READ TABLE lt_appr_coa INTO ls_appr_coa INDEX 1.
ELSEIF sy-subrc EQ 0 AND iv_level_up IS INITIAL.

FILTERED_OPEN_LINES.item: ***filter the records based on Unique Cost Object
***Reading only the Unique Records based on
READ TABLE lt_filtered_line FROM ls_open_line1 TRANSPORTING NO FIELDS.

GET_APPROVER_LIST.item: * get matched approver list based on table /OPT/BL_T401
lt_appcoa TYPE SORTED TABLE OF ty_appcoa INITIAL SIZE 0 WITH UNIQUE KEY appcoa-opt_userid appcoa-counter, "added 12236
DATA: lt_vbsegk TYPE TABLE OF vbsegk.
DATA: lt_vbsegs TYPE TABLE OF vbsegs.
DATA: lt_rseg TYPE TABLE OF rseg.
DATA: lt_rbco TYPE TABLE OF rbco.
DATA: lt_bseg TYPE TABLE OF bseg,
READ TABLE i_t401 INTO s_t401 WITH KEY header = 'X'.
READ TABLE i_t401 INTO s_t401 WITH KEY header = ' '.
SELECT * FROM vbsegk INTO TABLE lt_vbsegk
SELECT * FROM bseg INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_vbsegk
* When withholding tax is posted, its amounts are subtracted from the vendor line
* and posted as separate lines. We need to add them to get the real gross amount.
READ TABLE lt_vbsegk INTO s_vbsegk INDEX 1.
MODIFY lt_vbsegk FROM s_vbsegk INDEX 1 TRANSPORTING wrbtr.
READ TABLE lt_vbsegk INTO s_vbsegk INDEX line_item_no.
SELECT * FROM vbsegs INTO TABLE lt_vbsegs
SELECT * FROM bseg INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_vbsegs
*No coding line and approve, should find next approver
READ TABLE lt_vbsegs INTO s_vbsegs INDEX line_item_no.
SELECT * FROM rseg INTO TABLE lt_rseg
READ TABLE lt_rseg INTO s_rseg INDEX line_item_no.
SELECT * FROM rbco INTO TABLE lt_rbco
*No coding line and approve, should find next approver
READ TABLE lt_rbco INTO s_rbco INDEX line_item_no.
READ TABLE it_1item INTO wa_1item INDEX line_item_no.
READ TABLE it_1item INTO wa_1item INDEX line_item_no.
* Start of changes by aturlapa VIMI-5398.
* End of changes by aturlapa VIMI-5398.
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE ls_invdata
* assign value of account header field
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE s_vbsegk
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE s_vbkpf
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE wa_1item
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE wa_1head
* assign value of account header field
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE s_vbsegs
* assign value of account header field
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE s_rseg
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE s_rbkp
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE wa_1item
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE wa_1head
* assign value of account header field
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE s_rbco
* assign value of account header field
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE wa_1item
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE wa_1head
* assign value of account header field
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-inv_tab_fld OF STRUCTURE wa_1item
IF s_t401-fieldname = 'WBS_ELEMENT' AND NOT s_appcoa-wbs_element IS INITIAL AND "added 12236
*-- Check whether validation already failed for an approver
READ TABLE lt_appcoa INTO ls_appcoa WITH KEY
* assign value of configuration table field
ASSIGN COMPONENT s_t401-fieldname OF STRUCTURE s_appcoa
MODIFY lt_appcoa FROM ls_appcoa INDEX lv_index.
MODIFY lt_appcoa FROM ls_appcoa INDEX lv_index.
*-- Delete the users whose validation failed
* for PROCESS_FLAG = 'U'(from next) need send all lines for this
APPEND LINES OF lt_appcoa TO appcoa_list.

GET_CODER_LIST.item: * get coder list based on company code and/or requester
*We use internal table lt_coder_list instead of coder_list
*in order to get also requestor and do additional check for
DATA: lt_coder_list TYPE TABLE OF t_coder,
IF NOT usermap_list[] IS INITIAL. "5.1.6 SP1 change
IF NOT usermap_list[] IS INITIAL. "5.1.6 SP1 change
WHEN 'B'. "by both requester and company code
IF NOT usermap_list[] IS INITIAL. "5.1.6 SP1 change
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_coder_list COMPARING coder_id."VIMI-5625
* delete ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM coder_list COMPARING CODER_ID.
IF vc_value NE 'S' AND using_flag = 'S'. "5.1.6 Hotfix2
*-- when there is 1:1 relation bt coder & requestor or company code
*-- the default flag can be blank. in other cases there may be more than
*-- one record with default checked and blank we need only default
DELETE lt_coder_list WHERE default_flag IS INITIAL."VIMI-5625

GET_COMPANY_REQUESTER.item: * 1: Get the requester from monitor table for NPO invoice
SELECT requisitioner counter UP TO 1 ROWS
*-- for posted DP-invoice check in DP header table
* SELECT email_id bukrs requisitioner UP TO 1 ROWS
SELECT a~email_id a~bukrs a~requisitioner UP TO 1 ROWS
FROM /opt/vim_1head AS a INNER JOIN /opt/vim_t100 AS b
SELECT requisitioner counter UP TO 1 ROWS
*-- for posted DP-invoice check in DP header table
* SELECT email_id bukrs requisitioner UP TO 1 ROWS
SELECT a~email_id a~bukrs a~requisitioner UP TO 1 ROWS
FROM /opt/vim_1head AS a INNER JOIN /opt/vim_t100 AS b
* IF NOT vc_requisitioner IS INITIAL. "5.2 HF1
* if no requisitionerfound, use creator of PO
TRANSLATE vc_afnam TO UPPER CASE. "#EC TRANSLANG "5.2 HF1
IF sy-subrc EQ 0 AND NOT requester_id IS INITIAL.
* if no requisitioner found, use creator of PO
TRANSLATE vc_afnam TO UPPER CASE. " VIMI-13389

GET_USERLIST_BY_SELECTION.item: * VIMI-9051 - Created new Method to reuse the coding for LBA Searchhelp
DATA: fn TYPE RANGE OF xuname1,
TRANSLATE iv_opt_userid TO UPPER CASE. "5.2 SP5
* DELETE i_usermap WHERE opt_userid = iv_current_approver. " Commented for VIMI-24798
*** Begin of VIMI-41072 --- Commenting below loop, Performance Improvement
* TRANSLATE s_usermap-opt_userid TO UPPER CASE. "5.2 SP5
* OR NOT s_usermap-opt_userid IN id . "5.2 SP5
delete i_usermap where lastname not in ln.
delete i_usermap where firstname not in fn.
delete i_usermap where opt_userid not in id.
DELETE i_usermap WHERE email NOT IN em. "#EC CI_STDSEQ

LBA_CALC_NET_GROSS_AMOUNT.item: * Calculates Net/Gross Amount for COA checks based on AFS Configuration
DATA: lt_acct_cfg TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF /ors/coding_cfg.
SELECT SINGLE bstat INTO lv_bstat FROM bkpf CLIENT SPECIFIED

LBA_CHECK_USER_AGAINST_COA.item: * Checks if provided line, field config and provided coa line matches
* xt_fields_ok contains the columns which can be approved
* xv_item_not_initial indicates that at least one configured cost object was filled
* Method has to be called in one or more loops as there may be many lines, many coa entries,
DATA: lt_fields_ok TYPE SORTED TABLE OF /opt/field_chkbox WITH UNIQUE KEY field."VIMI-28133
INSERT LINES OF xt_fields_ok INTO TABLE lt_fields_ok. "VIMI-28133
LOOP AT it_coa_field_cfg INTO ls_coa_field_cfg. "All Customized Fields
ASSIGN COMPONENT ls_coa_field_cfg-fieldname OF STRUCTURE is_cost_elem TO <item_value>.
ASSIGN COMPONENT ls_coa_field_cfg-fieldname OF STRUCTURE is_coa_user TO <coa_value>.
*-- If Ranges are allowed, create a "TO" field
ASSIGN COMPONENT lv_to_field OF STRUCTURE is_coa_user TO <coa_value_to>.
*-- Check if Item Value is in the COA Value
IF ls_coa_field_cfg-ranges = 'X' AND NOT <coa_value_to> IS INITIAL.
* NOT ( <coa_value> IS INITIAL AND <coa_value_to> IS INITIAL ).
IF ( mv_asterisk_allows_space <> 'X' AND <item_value> IS INITIAL AND
NOT ( <coa_value> IS INITIAL AND <coa_value_to> IS INITIAL ) ) OR
<coa_value> <> '*' AND NOT ( <coa_value> IS INITIAL AND <coa_value_to> IS INITIAL ) ).
* MODIFY xt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value"VIMI-28133
MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value"VIMI-28133
* VIMI-10121: no need for CONTINUE or EXIT, we just check all fields
* CONTINUE. "Run Next Approver Line as only one Cost Object is allowed per line
* IF <item_value> IS INITIAL AND NOT <coa_value> IS INITIAL.
IF ( mv_asterisk_allows_space <> 'X' AND <item_value> IS INITIAL AND NOT <coa_value> IS INITIAL ) OR
( mv_asterisk_allows_space = 'X' AND <item_value> IS INITIAL AND ( NOT <coa_value> IS INITIAL ) AND <coa_value> <> '*' ).
* MODIFY xt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value "VIMI-28133
MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value "VIMI-28133
* VIMI-10121: no need for CONTINUE or EXIT, we just check all fields
* CONTINUE. "Run Next Approver Line as only one Cost Object is allowed per line
IF lv_maa IS NOT INITIAL. " VIMI-41440
APPEND LINES OF lt_fields_ok TO xt_fields_ok."VIMI-28133

LBA_CONVERT_CURRENCY.item: ** Data type "VERI_DEC13" isn't existing in S4 HANA system
*-- Move to external formal for currencies with different decimals

LBA_GET_ALL_USER_FOR_LINES.item: * Method returns all Users which can approve at least one line
TYPES: lty_counter_tab TYPE SORTED TABLE OF lty_counter_line
WHERE inv_type IN ('N', ' ') AND header = space.
WHERE inv_type IN ('P', ' ') AND header = space.
*-- Check table needed to check all relevant configurations (fields and entries of COA)
*-- Add Customized fields to check structure
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value
*-- check if approver is allowed for all cost objects
* IF NOT lv_item_filled IS INITIAL. "Not relevant for checking next user
*-- Append Users which are allowed to approve
READ TABLE it_usermap INTO ls_usermap WITH KEY opt_userid = ls_coa_user-opt_userid.
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value
*-- check if approver is allowed for all cost objects
IF ( NOT lt_fields_ok IS INITIAL ) AND
*-- Append Users which are allowed to approve
READ TABLE it_usermap INTO ls_usermap WITH KEY opt_userid = ls_coa_user-opt_userid.
* return only the users that can approve all lines passed in IT_ITEMS

LBA_GET_INVOICE_DATA.item: * Reads Header and Item Data for current workitem
SELECT bukrs belnr gjahr FROM bkpf

LBA_GET_USERTYPE_BY_LEVEL.item: * Maps Approval and Stack Level to Stack User Type

LBA_MAP_COST_OBJECTS.item: * Maps Item Data / Approval History Data to Cost Object structure
* Move append structure fields dynamically assuming that field names match
* Move append structure fields dynamically assuming that field names match

LBA_SET_CODING_FLAGS.item: * Set Coding Flags depending on next approver values but adjusted to LBA
*-- Move all configured Flags to exporting structure
*-- Set Coding Flag only for Coders and Requesters if they are Coder
xs_next_approver-look_ahead = space. "Look ahead is not available in LBA
IF is_afs-afs_type = 'P' AND "No overwrite for parallel in LBA
iv_level >= 1. "VIMI-19327 - only for requesters and approvers
xs_next_approver-override = space. "No overwrite for parallel in LBA

NAMESEARCH_APPROVER.item: * for name search, use all approvers
*-- When no match found clear the list of users
*-- When no match found clear the list of users
* loop at i_appcoa into s_appcoa where currency = vc_doc_currency
** same currency and limit >= amount, save
** delete all records already in i_appcoa_1
* delete i_appcoa where OPT_USERID in r_opt_id.
* need find out lagest limit for each approver?
** if can not convert, delete this record
** if approver limit < doc amount, delete this record

NAMESEARCH_CODER.item: DATA: i_coder TYPE TABLE OF t_coder.
* if no coder found, find all coders based on filtered usermap

ADDNEWMAPPING.item: DATA : bapi_ret TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapiret2,
* get z constant for optuser_id determining
* add default preference for this user.
SELECT SINGLE datfm dcpfm FROM usr01

CHECKEXISTENCE.item: ** check if email userid in other email address

COMPOSE_OPT_ID.item: * if .net, concatenate window id and windoe domain
* Check to see if user already exists and is valid
* Check to see if deleted user needs to be re-created
* if EP6 SAP portal, use EP6 id
* Check to see if user already exists and is valid
* Check to see if deleted user needs to be re-created
* if Email id, use email id
* Check to see if user already exists and is valid
* Check to see if deleted user needs to be re-created

LBA_CHECK_APPR_LIMIT.item: * Method checks provided amounts against the COA information,
* calculates the values in correct currency,
* and returns the limits, currency and the flag for final approval
*-- Get Approval Limit for provided BUKRS/LEVEL/EXP TYPE
*-- Get Approval Limit for provided BUKRS/LEVEL
*-- Set TO Currency either by BUKRS or by customizing
* a user can enter a manual exchange rate in the indexing screen,
* this is considered only when the man_kursf flag in VIM_2head is set
* we need to consider this manual exchange rate when checking the approval limit.
* This exchange rate is to be considered, only when the AFS ID COA curreny type is L
* because the manual exchange rate is always a conversion between CC currency and DOc currency
* other wise we continue with Standard conversion and ignore the Manual exchange rate.
* Check if a manual Exchange rate has been used
IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL AND lv_manual EQ 'X'.
*-- Check Limits according to COA customizing
*-- Check Level Limit agaist Total Invoice Amount
*-- Check Level Limit against Pack Amount AND
*-- Check Additional Level Limit against Additional Amount
*-- Check Level Limit against Pack Amount

LBA_CHECK_BUFFERED.item: IF sy-subrc <> 0. "line not in the log - open
IF NOT lv_changed IS INITIAL. "if changed - need to approve again
IF ls_log-status CA 'RXW'. "if rejected or final appr - need to approve again
ELSE. "approved before but cannot approve now

LBA_CHECK_LINE_FOR_APPROVER.item: * Checks the provided line and the current approver against the COA
DATA lv_flag TYPE c VALUE IS INITIAL. "Added - VIMI-32338
* WHERE inv_type IN ('N', ' ') AND header = space.
* WHERE inv_type IN ('P', ' ') AND header = space.
* SELECT * FROM /opt/bl_t401 INTO ls_t401 WHERE inv_type IN ('N', ' ')
* SELECT * FROM /opt/bl_t401 INTO ls_t401 WHERE inv_type IN ('P', ' ')
* SELECT * FROM /opt/bl_t401 INTO ls_t401 WHERE header = space.
IF iv_device IS NOT INITIAL AND iv_device NE 'SAP'
DELETE lt_appr_coa WHERE expense_type NE is_line-expense_type.
* INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
DELETE lt_appr_coa WHERE opt_userid NE is_current_approver-approver.
*-- Check table needed to check all relevant configurations (fields and entries of COA)
**-- Add Customized fields to check structure
lt_fields_ok = CORRESPONDING #( lt_t401 MAPPING field = fieldname ). "VIMI-31640
* Converting line item WBS element value from external to internal
*-- check if approver is allowed for all cost objects
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value.
** The flag was added to restrict the number of iterations of the loop
*-- check if all fields of the invoice match the COA

LBA_GET_APPROVER_FOR_LINE.item: * Method checks COA for the provided line, first user will be returned
* VIMI-10121: allow multiple cost elements per COA line
*-- Check table needed to check all relevant configurations (fields and entries of COA)
*-- Add Customized fields to check structure
* Converting line item WBS element value from external to internal
* ==> Loop over all relevant user and all COA fields
* ==> The appropriate approver with the default flag or the first appropriate approver will be taken
LOOP AT it_coa_user INTO ls_coa_user. "All relevant Users (each user can be maintained several times)
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value
* -- check if approver is allowed for all cost objects
* IF NOT lv_item_filled IS INITIAL. "Not relevant for checking next user
* ==> Loop over all relevant user and all COA fields
* ==> The appropriate approver with the default flag or the first appropriate approver will be taken
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value
*-- check if all fields of the invoice match the COA
if ls_coa_user-expense_type eq IS_HEADER-EXPENSE_TYPE. "Insert of VIMI-24513

LBA_GET_APPROVER_LIST_HEADER.item: * Header based: Only one User for each Level
* Goal: Return User for next Level
* ==> Search User with Highest Pack (Create different Packs for all Users)
* ==> Check his Limit against the Total Invoice Amount
* ==> Check his Limit against the Pack Amount and
* Check the sum of the remaining lines against the "COA Additional Amount"
*-- Set Path (In Header Based Approval Path is always 1, except of Coder/Requester)
****Filtering of all the items are done wherein
****unique cost elements are sent further to find
****the approvers based on grouping lines is checked in AFS ID
*-- Check if Requester should be taken from the invoice
IF iv_level_up = 'X' AND lv_level = 1 AND is_afs-requester_det = 'I'. "Use Requester from the invoice
WHERE inv_type IN ('N', ' ') AND header = space.
WHERE inv_type IN ('P', ' ') AND header = space.
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
SORT lt_appr_coa BY comp_code appr_level opt_userid otype actorid counter. "VIMI-10683
* -- Check table needed to check all relevant configurations (fields and entries of COA)
* -- Add Customized fields to check structure
* -- Get single Users from COA Auth Table
* ==> Loop over all relevant user, all items and all COA fields
* ==> The approver with the highest pack will be the next approver
* ==> A Pack consists of all lines of a Company Code that a user is allowed to approve
LOOP AT lt_coa_user INTO ls_coa_user. "All Users
* -- New Pack for each User ID
* begin VIMI-12829 - reset for each line instead
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value
* LOOP AT it_current_hist INTO ls_current_hist. "All Items
*****Instead of looping all the items the filtered lines with unique cost elements in lt_open_lines
MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value
* instead of scanning the whole table with a where clause,
* we identify the entries that are relevant for the user by determining the index via a read table
* LOOP AT lt_appr_coa INTO ls_appr_coa WHERE opt_userid = ls_coa_user-opt_userid. "User specific Auth.
LOOP AT lt_appr_coa INTO ls_appr_coa FROM lv_index. "User specific Auth.
* -- But we need to create also a new Pack for each Company Code
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value
* LOOP AT lt_appr_coa INTO ls_appr_coa WHERE opt_userid = ls_coa_user-opt_userid. "User specific Auth.
LOOP AT lt_appr_coa INTO ls_appr_coa FROM lv_index. "User specific Auth.
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value.
* -- Save Relevant Items for the current User
* -- Check if approver is allowed for all cost objects
IF ( NOT lt_fields_ok IS INITIAL ) AND
* -- Sum Up the Pack Value to determine the highest
EXIT. "from the COA loop, go with the next line
* -- Save Relevant Items for the current User
* -- Check if approver is allowed for all cost objects
* IF NOT lv_item_filled IS INITIAL. "Not relevant for checking next user
* -- Sum Up the Pack Value to determine the highest
* -- Check if New Pack Value is higher than existing one
READ TABLE lt_fallback INTO ls_fallback INDEX 1.

LBA_GET_APPROVER_LIST_LINE.item: * Goal: Return User for LEVEL and PATH
* ==> Check and increase LEVEL if needed, build PATH (pack)
* ==> check all other lines if they can be processed by this user
* ==> Read next line => find User, check all other lines if they can be processed by this user,..
* Sequential: Only one line is provided => Search a User
* ==> Path will never be changed!! (only one open line will be received)
* ==> Pack Nr will be increased per User
* Parallel: different lines are provided ==> Search Users for several lines
* ==> Path will be increased per User
* ==> Pack Nr will be increased per User
READ TABLE lt_open_lines INTO ls_next_line INDEX 1.
* WHERE inv_type IN ('N', ' ') AND header = space.
* WHERE inv_type IN ('P', ' ') AND header = space.
*****Line Items filtering is done based on
****unique cost elements the line items are filtered
* INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
* INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
*-- Check if Requester should be taken from the invoice
IF iv_level_up = 'X' AND lv_level = 1 AND is_afs-requester_det = 'I'. "Use Requester from the invoice
IF lv_level >= 2 AND NOT is_afs-buffer_active IS INITIAL.
* The DO loop runs until we find some lines have been changed or rejected or
* we get into the level where the log data for some lines is missing.
* If no such lines found, and if some lines were approved in the level
* (but not final approved), we try one level higher.
* If going up like this, we get into the level where all lines were final approved,
* the current approval is then the final one.
ls_log-status = 'A'. "if rejected or final appr - need to approve again
* check if the logged approver can still approve
* if it was approved by a substitute, change the approver if needed
* IF NOT lt_open_lines2[] IS INITIAL. "there are open lines for this level - get approvers
* EXIT. "from DO - get next approvers now
* lv_level = lv_level + 1. "get into the next level
* lt_open_lines[] = lt_approved_lines[]. "and assume those lines can be still open at that level
* CONTINUE. "next DO iteration, with the next level
* EXIT. "from DO - all lines must be finally approved before in this level
*-- Get COA Users and correct path
* INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
APPEND LINES OF lt_appr_coa_save TO lt_appr_coa.
* when going up, check the paths in the LBA log table
* INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
APPEND LINES OF lt_appr_coa_save TO lt_appr_coa.
* when staying in the same level, check the paths in the appr history
SORT lt_appr_coa BY comp_code appr_level opt_userid otype actorid counter. "VIMI-10683
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_appr_coa COMPARING comp_code appr_level opt_userid otype actorid counter.
DELETE lt_appr_coa WHERE opt_userid IS INITIAL.
*-- Get Users by Level/Path for all delivered Items
CLEAR: lv_approver, ls_next_line, ls_next_approver, lt_additional_lines, lv_almost_one,
READ TABLE lt_open_lines INTO ls_next_line INDEX 1.
* CR3 - Allow multiple approvers for same line - Start
"Keep track of approvers for each line
* CR3 - Allow multiple approvers for same line - End
*-- Just one approver is needed for Sequential Approval and also for Coding/Requester Step
REFRESH lt_next_level_lines. "VIMI-16497 - no need to try skips in this case
* ELSE. "this line needs to be tried in the next level "VIMI-9857 "VIMI-16497
*****Dynamic Select to skip some of the Levels which
****are not required for Validation for better performance
DELETE lt_appr_coa WHERE opt_userid NE lv_approver.
* -- Check all other lines for the found User
* -- Append all supplied lines and delete them from the open lines table
* if we could not find any approvers at the current level, try if we can skip COA levels
* we also check the approvers in the upper levels for lines approved through buffer
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
IF sy-subrc = 0. "there are higher COA levels, try them
IF NOT lt_next_approvers2[] IS INITIAL. "all lines could find their approvers up in the COA?
lt_next_approvers = lt_next_approvers2. "if no appr at current level, return higher levels
* Leave only one approver for sequential approval.

LBA_GET_CODER_LIST.item: * Called by New Method, returns initial Coder/Requester
*-- Get AFS Settings is not provided
IF is_afs IS INITIAL OR is_afs_map IS INITIAL.
READ TABLE lt_coder INTO ls_coder WITH KEY default_flag = 'X'.
READ TABLE lt_coder INTO ls_coder INDEX 1.
READ TABLE lt_coder INTO ls_coder WITH KEY default_flag = 'X'.
READ TABLE lt_coder INTO ls_coder INDEX 1.
READ TABLE lt_coder INTO ls_coder WITH KEY default_flag = 'X'.
READ TABLE lt_coder INTO ls_coder INDEX 1.

LBA_GET_LINES_FOR_APPROVER.item: * Method returns all lines which can be approved by the provided user
WHERE inv_type in ('N', ' ') AND header = space.
WHERE inv_type in ('P', ' ') AND header = space.
*-- Check table needed to check all relevant configurations (fields and entries of COA)
*-- Add Customized fields to check structure
DELETE lt_coa_user WHERE opt_userid NE iv_approver.
*-- Search for Lines which can also be approved by provided approver
LOOP AT it_items INTO ls_item. "All Remaining Items
MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value.
* if multiple cost elements are allowed in COA lines,
* we reset the "ok" flags for each line
* MODIFY lt_fields_ok FROM ls_fields_ok TRANSPORTING value.
IF ( NOT lv_multi_acctass IS INITIAL ) AND
IF lv_exit IS INITIAL. "this line is ok, add and try next line
*-- check if approver is allowed for all cost objects
* IF NOT lv_item_filled IS INITIAL. "Not relevant for checking next user

LBA_GET_LINE_INFO_FOR_APPROVER.item: * Checks provided line and returns status, edit flag, approvable flag,
* status icon and a tooltip text for the icon
* IS_CURRENT_APPROVER is the Approver which originally received the Workitem
* VIMI-10130: Depending on the AFS flag subs_inherit_coa,
* the approver may be reset later to the original one.
*-- Set empty lines editable or not
SORT lt_appr_his BY itemid appr_level. "INSERT of VIMI-24897/MSAMPATH
SORT lt_appr_his BY itemid appr_level. "INSERT VIMI-17584: ASUTHARA
READ TABLE lt_appr_his INTO ls_appr_his WITH KEY itemid = lv_itemid
appr_level = ls_current_approver-appr_level BINARY SEARCH. "INSERTED VIMI-17584: ASUTHARA
*-- Not found in current level, check for final approval in prior level
READ TABLE lt_appr_his INTO ls_appr_his WITH KEY itemid = lv_itemid
*-- Item does not exist in this level but in prior one
* Do not do any status resets if the history entry came from the lower level
* find the originally assigned approver of approved line, for substitute check
*-- Change status because User has to approve his already approved line again
* in case the buffer is enabled, all lines approved (in this level) by the current approver
* will be open again also on approval levels.
* Note: the lines may include those approved while substituting someone
* - those will not be open (only "own" lines will be).
READ TABLE iv_current_users INTO lv_approver WITH KEY current_approver = ls_appr_his-current_approver.
IF NOT ls_usermap-firstname IS INITIAL OR
* ICON_AGENT_UPTODATE => approved by someone else in this level
* ICON_ALLOW => you are allowed to approve
* VIMI-10130: icon or name will be displayed at all times because the item
* can be approved etc by the current user as a substitute
WHEN 'A' OR 'C'. "Approved or Coded in this Level
WHEN 'N' OR 'R' OR 'Y' OR 'Z'. "New or Rejected => check COA for current line
* Check the COA with the original approver

LBA_MAP_COST_TO_ACCT.item: ***the history table records to the cost objects maintained in /opt/appr_coa
****Moving back the logic to the history record
****so that the line item contains only the cost objects in the history table record
*****If custom fields are configured in /opt/appr_coa it would be mappend

LBA_SEARCHHELPS.item: * Called for each searchhelp, returns all relevant users
*-- Get COA Users depending on the Selection
iv_action IS INITIAL. "e.g. Substitute Search does not deliver any action
*-- Get all Users from COA from the same Level for the remaining lines
*-- Read Approval History to determine open lines
* For parallel, add lines touched by someone else
*-- Get User from COA Table for current Level
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
SORT lt_appr_coa BY comp_code appr_level opt_userid otype actorid counter. "VIMI-10683
*-- Get relevant Users for open lines
* For sequential or for coder/requester, return all users
* that can approve at least one line among open lines
* For parallel, when forwarding, starting from approver level, return
* only those who can approve (at least) same lines as the curr.approver
* Find the lines that can be approved
* get approvers list for those lines
iv_restricted = 'X' "able to approve all passed lines
*-- Get all Users from COA from next Level for the remaining lines
*-- Add current User to Usermap table
* APPEND ls_usermap TO lt_usermap."Commented for VIMI-24798
* Open lines will be determined differently to account for buffer and COA skips
*-- Read Approval History to determine not fully approved lines
* Start with the current level or those below,
* remove those finally approved (or will be)
* and then from the remaining, remove those that will be
SORT lt_appr_his BY itemid ASCENDING appr_level DESCENDING.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_appr_his COMPARING itemid.
IF lv_changed IS INITIAL. "not changed and will be approved through buffer
* check if the logged approver can still approve
* The next level will be set correctly in the call of /ORS/000007_NAME_SEARCH
*-- Get User from COA Table for next Level
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
SORT lt_appr_coa BY comp_code appr_level opt_userid otype actorid counter. "VIMI-10683
*-- Get relevant Users for next Level
* IF et_user_list IS INITIAL AND NOT is_afs-fallback_user_fm IS INITIAL.
( iv_level < 2 OR is_afs-afs_type <> 'P' ) AND "No fallback for parallel fwd
*-- Return Fallback User only if user has explicitly searched for him
READ TABLE lt_usermap WITH KEY opt_userid = ls_fallback-opt_userid

LBA_SKIP_COA.item: WHERE inv_type IN ('N', ' ') AND header = space.
WHERE inv_type IN ('P', ' ') AND header = space.
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
IF sy-subrc <> 0. "if no level data maintained, check if there is anything up
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_appr_coa
ELSE. "there are higher levels, try them
* when going up, check the paths in the LBA log table
SORT lt_appr_coa BY comp_code appr_level opt_userid otype actorid counter. "VIMI-10683
*-- Get Users by Level/Path for all delivered Items
* The logic is similar to LBA_GET_APPROVER_LIST_LINE
READ TABLE lt_open_lines INTO ls_next_line INDEX 1.
ELSE. "this line needs to be tried in the next level
DELETE lt_appr_coa WHERE opt_userid NE lv_approver.
* -- Check all other lines for the found User
iv_allow_empty_line = ' ' "VIMI-11431 - should be filled at approver level
* -- Append all supplied lines and delete them from the open lines table
* check if we have any lines whose approvers could not be found in the current level
IF NOT lt_next_approvers2[] IS INITIAL. "all lines could find their approvers up in the COA?
ct_next_approvers = lt_next_approvers. "return the current level approvers only, if found

NAMESEARCH.item: * Begin of VIMI-9051 - rosterma / Moved the exiting Logic to the method
*-- Get COA Users depending on the Selection
* from now on, i_usermap is default, any time no match found, use it
